stemHtml: You are flying a light aircraft and you want to cross the track of a heavy aircraft flying ahead of you. What is the best way to do so without getting into turbulence?

options.a: Fly below the track of the aircraft ahead of you and then cross the track
options.b: Fly above the track of the aircraft ahead of you and then cross the track
options.c: Maintain a similar altitude and cross the track downwind
options.d: Fly below the track of the aircraft ahead of you and then cross the track downwind
